title: cedrus libanotica f. glauca
intro: Cedrus libanotica f. glauca, also known as the Lebanese cedar, is a coniferous evergreen tree that belongs to the Pinaceae family. This tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cedrus libanotica f. glauca include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function, among others. The tree's essential oil can be prepared through steam distillation, which is used in herbal remedies, perfumes, and aromatherapy, showcasing its versatility in various applications.
